text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking back to my office during my lunch
break...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Ah, King's trainer.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, you've come at just the right time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I know it's lunchtime, but can we borrow your
office?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's a quiz coming up, and we want to study
for it, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, there are no study spaces
available at the moment.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
For that reason, I hereby grant you the right to
lend your room out to me and my associate!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excellent, this place is perfect for my studies. A
splendid idea, if I do say so myself.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Right then, let's work hard to overcome our
weaker subjects!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sounds good to me! ♪
choice_data_list: Thank you for looking out for King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ahem! And what do you mean by that? You should be thanking me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Grass requested my assistance!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little unsure about certain aspects of
applied math, so King is tutoring me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's true that Grass does have excellent grades
and doesn't seem the type to need tutoring...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But my grades are top class as well! I'm first-rate
both in and out of the classroom!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's true that King is truly a cut above.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She always gets good grades on tests and is
regarded highly by all the teachers.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But what's most impressive is her ability to meet
difficult problems head-on!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! You flatter me! But of course, it's the
truth!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, do you see now? I'm quite capable of
holding my own against Grass!
choice_data_list:
You two are rivals even when it comes to
studying, huh?

You two are rivals even when it comes to
studying, huh?
But which one of you is actually the best?
But which one of you is actually the best?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, do you see now? I'm quite capable of
holding my own against Grass!
choice_data_list:
You two are rivals even when it comes to
studying, huh?

You two are rivals even when it comes to
studying, huh?
But which one of you is actually the best?
But which one of you is actually the best?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! Whether it's studying or racing, we're
opponents who drive each other to greater
heights!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come along, Grass! We must set our sights on
becoming first-rate Umamusume together, then
spread our wings as a first-rate duo!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hm? Spread our wings... as a duo?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! We can pioneer an all-new act! A
first-rate one, of course! Ohohoho!

As respectful rivals, the pair drive each other to
improve at both racing and studying.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ngh! G-Grass...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Grass may have won this time... But the next quiz
is mine!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe, then I had better not let my guard down.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I'll show you what a royal comeback
looks like!

Although fiercely competitive, the two end up
being splendid study buddies.
